title: Mission to Trasse
content:
{{Top|leg}} {{Conjecture|legends}} {{Battle |prev=[[Escape from Kalaan]]''[[Star Wars: Force Commander]]'' |conc= |next=[[Liberation of Abridon]] |image=[[File:Trasse_battle.jpg]] |name=Mission to Trasse |conflict=[[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]] |date=[[3 ABY/Legends|3 ABY]]This battle occurs prior to the start of [[Star Wars: Episode VI Return of the Jedi|''Star Wars'': Episode VI ''Return of the Jedi'']], which begins at the start of the [[4 ABY/Legends|4 ABY]] year. |place=[[Trasse/Legends|Trasse]] |result=*[[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] victory; [[All Terrain Armored Transport/Legends|AT-AT]] stolen |side1=[[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] |side2=Alliance to Restore the Republic |side3= |side4= |commanders1=*[[Grand General/Legends|Grand General]] [[Malcor Brashin]] |commanders2=*[[General/Legends|General]] [[Tyr Taskeen]] *General [[Brenn Tantor]] *[[Beri Tulon]] |commanders3= |commanders4= |unit1= |unit2= |unit3= |unit4= |forces1=*[[Stormtrooper/Legends|Stormtroopers]] *[[All Terrain Personal Transport/Legends|AT-PT walkers]] *[[All Terrain Scout Transport/Legends|AT-ST walkers]] *[[All Terrain Armored Transport/Legends|AT-AT walkers]] *[[All Terrain Anti Aircraft/Legends|AT-AA walkers]] *[[Imperial Troop Carrier|Troop Carriers]] *[[74-Z speeder bike/Legends|74-Z speeder bikes]] *[[TIE/ln space superiority starfighter/Legends|TIE fighters]] *[[V-150 Planet Defender/Legends|v-150 Planet Defender]] [[Ion cannon/Legends|ion cannon]] *[[Imperial I-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Imperial I''-class Star Destroyer]] **[[Inquisitor (Star Destroyer)|''Inquisitor'']] |forces2=*[[Alliance Special Forces/Legends|Rebel troopers]] *[[Infiltrator (armor)|Infiltrators]] *[[Hover Transport TC9]]s *[[All Terrain Armored Transport/Legends|AT-AT walkers]] *[[BTL Y-wing starfighter/Legends|BTL Y-wing starfighters]] *[[1.4 FD P-Tower/Legends|1.4 FD P-Towers]] *[[DF.9/Legends|DF.9]] anti-infantry batteries *[[V-150 Planet Defender/Legends|v-150 Planet Defender]] [[Ion cannon/Legends|ion cannon]] *[[CR90 corvette/Legends|CR90 corvette]] |forces3= |forces4= |casual1=*Heavy |casual2=*Light to moderate |casual3= |casual4= |civilian= }} {{Quote|So tell me again about how this plan has a high probability of success?''"
"''I never said any such thing.|[[Tyr Taskeen]] and [[Beri Tulon]]|}} Not long before the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]], [[Brenn Tantor]] undertook a '''mission to Trasse'''. Tantor's goal was to steal an [[All Terrain Armored Transport/Legends|All Terrain Armored Transport]] from the [[Trasse Proving Grounds]]. Some months ago, Tantor had defected to the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]]. As a high-profile [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] general, Tantor faced significant suspicion from General Tyr Taskeen, his new superior. To prove his goodwill, Tantor offered to acquire an AT-AT for the Rebellion. Taskeen agreed. Tantor first led a [[Mission to Ruul (Galactic Civil War)|mission to Ruul]] that freed his old mentor, [[Beri Tulon]], from [[Tarkin Detention Facility|Imperial custody]]. Tulon gave Tantor the location of an AT-AT factory: [[Trasse/Legends|Trasse]], where he had served for one and a half years. Tantor and Tulon stole the access codes to the [[Trasse system/Legends|Trasse system]] from the [[Sounder Flats computer complex]], then began the preparations for the raid on Trasse. [[File:Proving_grounds.jpg|thumb|left|200px|The [[Trasse Proving Grounds]].]] With Tulon's unit of [[Infiltrator (armor)|Infiltrators]] trained to enter and seize control of AT-ATs, Taskeen, Tantor, and Tulon set off for Trasse. They were able to enter the system undetected with the stolen codes and landed a light force a short distance from the Proving Grounds. Tantor's Y-wings disabled at least one AT-AT on the Proving Grounds, clearing the way for the insertion of the Infiltrators. Though the stolen goods returned to the base safely, their extraction was compromised by the arrival of the [[Star Destroyer/Legends|Star Destroyer]] [[Inquisitor (Star Destroyer)|''Inquisitor'']] over the asteroid, blocking the Rebels' escape. Its commander, [[Grand General/Legends|Grand General]] [[Malcor Brashin]], opened up communications with Tantor. Tantor ignored his old superior's taunts, instead offering him the chance to defect to the Alliance. Unsurprisingly, Brashin refused and began landing troops. Tantor took his one chance, hammering through the Imperial forces to the nearby base, home to a [[planetary ion cannon]]. His troops rushed the base, taking control of the cannon, from which Tulon fired three shots. Those blasts were enough to disable the ''Inquisitor'', leaving the Rebels free to escape. In the course of [[Slicer/Legends|slicing]] into the cannon's computer banks, Tulon discovered increased shipments of [[Walker/Legends|walkers]] to [[Endor/Legends|Endor]]. Tantor correctly interpreted this as a sign that the [[Death Star II/Legends|Death Star II]] was nearly operational. Now armed with both an AT-AT and this knowledge, the Rebel [[CR90 corvette/Legends|Corellian Corvette]] blasted past the ''Inquisitor''{{'s}} inert form and free of the [[Asteroid field/Legends|asteroid belt]]. ==Appearances== *''[[Star Wars: Force Commander]]'' ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{GCW_3_ABY_2}} {{Interlang |de=Schlacht von Trasse }} {{DEFAULTSORT:Trasse, mission to}} [[Category:Battles in the Sarka sector]] [[Category:Missions of the Galactic Civil War]]
